summary: Iteration 84: Tested ALICE-inspired Echo Concierge rebuild with saved filters, sortable columns, pagination, shift log with auto-populated open tickets, and WebSocket order tracking. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Echo Concierge panel fully functional with 8 saved filter views, Quick Stats, sortable table headers, search, pagination, right-click context menu, and Shift Log tab showing auto-populated open tickets. Guest ordering WebSocket tracking working with 4-step progress tracker.

issues: Minor: React DOM nesting warning for RightClickMenu in tbody - cosmetic only, functionality works

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Echo Concierge panel, saved filters, shift log, guest ordering tracking all working)

seed_data_creation: Shift log entry created during testing with auto_open_tickets populated
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 tested Echo Concierge ALICE-inspired rebuild. Access via taskbar icon [data-testid='taskbar-echo-concierge']. Panel has 4 tabs: Tickets (default), Report Issue, Shift Log, Analytics. Tickets tab has: left sidebar with 8 saved filter views (Guest Requests, Maintenance, Housekeeping, Critical & High, Open Issues, Recovery Actions, SPA Issues, F&B Complaints), Quick Stats (Active, Resolved, SLA Breaches, Recovery), status filter buttons, search bar, sortable column headers (click to sort, shows ▲/▼), pagination footer with per-page dropdown (10/25/50/100). Right-click context menu on ticket rows shows: Start Working, Dispatch, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Escalate to GM. Shift Log tab has form (author, shift AM/PM/Night, notes, handoff items, VIP alerts) and Recent Shift Logs showing auto_open_tickets. Guest ordering at /guest-order has WebSocket tracking with 4-step progress (Received, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered) and polling fallback.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/concierge/dashboard - returns KPIs (total, active, resolved, sla_breaches, recovery_cost)
POST /api/concierge/shift-log - creates entry with auto_open_tickets populated
GET /api/guest-order/menu - returns menu with current period
GET /api/guest-order/track/{id} - returns tracking data with status_label
PUT /api/guest-order/order/{id}/status?status=preparing - updates status, triggers WebSocket broadcast
frontend_echo_concierge_tests: Echo Concierge panel opens via taskbar icon
4 tabs present: Tickets, Report Issue, Shift Log, Analytics
Left sidebar shows 8 saved filter views with icons
Quick Stats section shows Active (7), Resolved (2), SLA Breaches (7), Recovery ($196)
Clicking saved filter filters ticket table
Status filter buttons: All, Open, In_progress, Dispatched, Resolved, Closed
Ticket search bar filters by title (searched 'AC' → 1 result)
Sortable column headers: Title, Category, Room, Guest, Priority, Dept, Recovery, Status, Actions
Pagination footer shows Total: 9 tickets, per-page dropdown, page navigation
Right-click context menu on ticket rows shows: Start Working, Dispatch, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Escalate to GM
Shift Log tab shows New Shift Handoff form (author, shift selector, notes, handoff items, VIP alerts)
Shift Log tab shows Recent Shift Logs with handoff items, VIP alerts, and OPEN TICKETS auto-populated
frontend_guest_ordering_tests: Auth screen at /guest-order with room number and last name inputs
Menu screen shows All Day Menu with 4 category tabs, 17 items
Cart drawer shows order details, special instructions, subtotal
Order confirmation shows 4-step progress tracker (Received, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered)
frontend_regression_tests: Desktop taskbar visible at bottom with 9 icons and clock

echo_concierge_saved_filters.details: 8 ALICE-inspired saved filter views in left sidebar: Guest Requests, Maintenance, Housekeeping, Critical & High, Open Issues, Recovery Actions, SPA Issues, F&B Complaints

echo_concierge_sortable_columns.details: Click column header to sort, shows ▲/▼ indicator

echo_concierge_pagination.details: Footer shows total count, per-page dropdown (10/25/50/100), page navigation arrows

echo_concierge_search.details: Search bar filters tickets by title/guest/room

echo_concierge_shift_log.details: Form with author, shift (AM/PM/Night), notes, handoff items, VIP alerts. Recent logs show auto_open_tickets

echo_concierge_context_menu.details: Right-click on ticket row shows: Start Working, Dispatch, Mark Resolved, Close Ticket, Escalate to GM

guest_order_websocket_tracking.details: 4-step progress tracker (Received, Preparing, On the Way, Delivered), WebSocket connection with polling fallback

mocked_apis.email_sending: SendGrid email sending is MOCKED - logs to MongoDB instead
mocked_apis.websocket_broadcast: WebSocket broadcast is REAL but requires WS client to verify real-time push
